improvements_submitted.description: Add + and - arithmetic operators for nanosecond offsets
Replace compiled Regex with [GeneratedRegex] source-generated regex
Add 15 new tests: implicit operators, parts constructor, local DateTime, Date property, overflow guards, negative Add*, Equals(object?), T-separator TryParse, Subtract overflow
Add DateTimeOffset constructor, ToDateTimeOffsetUtc(), and implicit operators

notes: Run 5: Added 2 new draft PRs this run — DateTimeOffset interop (#aw_dto_interop, approx #25) and IFormattable/IParsable/ISpanParsable (#aw_parsable_fmt, approx #26). Task 2 fell back: no real user issues exist (all open issues are auto-generated). Issues #19 and #21 are duplicate informational issues about the CI cache PR that could not be pushed due to protected workflow files — #19 should be closed as superseded by #21. Issues #23/#24 are rate-limit/failure reports, will auto-expire. Existing open Repo Assist PRs: #14, #15, #17, #18, #20, #22 (6 total before this run). CI action_required status is still present for all bot PRs — maintainer needs to approve workflow runs. Major upgrades (NUnit 3->4, coverlet 6->10, SDK 17->18) still deferred.
